headline: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on McKesson, Lowers Price Target to $989
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Charles Rhyee   maintains McKesson (NYSE:MCK) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $1012 to $989.

headline: Earnings Season May Be Last Hurrah For Hyperscalers And A Turning Point In The Market Cycle
summary: Q2 earnings could mark a market turning point as AI/growth risks rise and sentiment shifts to sector rotation. Click here to read what investors need to know.
